title: 阪神大賞典の後に・操縦桿はまだ手の中

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun beats Narita Brian. After the
race, she spies Narita Brian looking dissatisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting a fun race between the two of them, she
challenges Narita Brian once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she decides her next race will be the
same as Narita Brian's—the spring Tenno Sho.
